name: Loader
searchText: loader indicate loading state @mantine/core /core/loader children color loaders size type

props.name: children
props.description: Overrides default loader with given content

props.name: color
props.description: Key of theme.colors or any valid CSS color

props.name: loaders
props.description: Object of loaders components, can be customized via default props or inline.

props.name: size
props.description: Controls width and height of the loader. Loader has predefined xs-xl values. Numbers are converted to rem.
